microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing agent development workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Built an **AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — mirroring how AI copilots augment builder workflows in complex technical platforms.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to surface performance gaps and prioritize high-impact automation investments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, applying system design rigor to a complex platform migration.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and establishing a repeatable build→test→release model.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and improve iteration velocity for the engineering team.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, applying customer-obsessed product thinking to streamline a high-friction builder experience.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search presence to drive measurable funnel outcomes.
Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering actionable evaluation frameworks that informed strategic pricing decisions.
